description: Interactive Great Lakes map for Creatures of the Deep — fish, creatures, items, and the map monster.
intro: Great Lakes is the first unlockable area in Creatures of the Deep. You’ll find a wider variety of fish than in the starter zones, and the difficulty is slightly increased, but nothing overwhelming if you take the time to explore and experiment: click on a fish in the side menu to learn more about your next catches.
name: Great Lakes

title: Great Lakes map
